fields.title: Finish domain-owning Effect services for remaining tau legacy adapters
fields.description: Follow up on tau-os2: convert remaining legacy init wrappers in services/{agent,commit,exa,terminal-prompt,worked-for,editor,skill-marker,beads}.ts into domain-owning Effect services or remove the service layer indirection entirely. The current pass removed unsafe state/decoder patterns, but these files still reflect partial v4 migration.
fields.close_reason: Removed the remaining fake service wrappers from app bootstrap, moved feature registration directly into runTau, and replaced the hidden agent runtime singleton with an explicit runtime bridge owned by the extension runtime.
